## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint --prefix client`
- [ ] `npm test --prefix client`
- [ ] `npm run lint --prefix server`
- [ ] `npm test --prefix server`
- [ ] Relevant manual testing completed

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are small and logical
- [ ] CI passes
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
